title: Normalize Vec<&str> conversion variable naming
description: In commands.rs, the Vec<String>->Vec<&str> conversion for connect_with_failover appears twice with different names: 'endpoint_refs' (inside the send_fn_box closure, line ~243) and 'lwd_refs' (in spawn_block_watcher, line ~2853). Use a consistent name (lwd_refs throughout, or extract a helper). The inconsistency adds cognitive noise when reading the two sites.
